events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: manufacturing/assembly floor, carpentry & finishes, connectors & fasteners, rough-complete, observed missing hanger nails (empty holes). Need assess compliance per Simpson catalogs, IRC. Missing hanger nails means joist hangers/structural connectors not fully fastened. This is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk? Missing fasteners in structural hangers can be high/critical? In production floor, structural connection incomplete could lead to failure. But maybe medium/high. Need choose. Since rough-complete and missing hanger nails, risk high maybe. Let's think.

We need fill fields: decision fail, risk high, work_stage rough-complete, component_conditions [installed-defective, non-compliant], percent_complete maybe 85? value 0, sound_source "", confidence 1.0, event_time 0, rate 0, order [], workable [], findings ["Hanger nails are missing from connector holes"], actions ["Install specified hanger nails per manufacturer/Simpson catalog and IRC; verify all connector holes are filled with correct fasteners; re-inspect before close-out"], rationale "Missing nails in structural hangers leave the connector incomplete and unable to develop its rated capacity, violating manufacturer installation instructions and IRC fastening requirements.", references ["Simpson Strong-Tie catalog - connector installation requires all specified fasteners in all provided holes", "IRC R502.2.2 / R602.11 / fastener requirements for connectors"].

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
